G1BB_SUPP_TRANS (G1BB) Transfer Support Provided CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: transfer - ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person physical assist, 8 = ADL activity itself did not occur during entire 7 days
210 G1CA G1CA_SELF_WLK_RM (G1CA) Walk In Room Self Performance CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: walk in room - ADL self-performance "-" =
